title: Hosted Auth Webhook Synchronization
purpose: Replace local auth trigger sync with hosted Supabase Auth webhook → identity.users synchronization. user.created/update/deleted webhooks enqueue jobs that mutate identity.users.
architectural_constraints: Webhook signature verified against Supabase secret
Idempotency by webhook event ID + 24h dedup window
Outbox pattern for user mutation + event emission

deliverables.description: Webhook handler: verify signature, enqueue job, return 202
Process auth sync jobs: create/update/delete identity.users

acceptance_criteria: Valid webhook signature enqueues job and returns 202
Duplicate webhook event ignored via idempotency key
Sync writes to outbox in same transaction as user mutation

failure_modes.scenario: Webhook out of order (update before create)
failure_modes.mitigation: Delayed retry with exponential backoff, sequence validation
Reconciliation job scans for orphaned auth identities
